# openwrt-docs4ai - LLM Routing Index
> For a flat file listing, see [llms-full.txt](./llms-full.txt)

> **Version:** openwrt/openwrt@unknown, openwrt/luci@unknown
> **Total Context Available:** ~5130 tokens

## Scripting & Logic
- [ucode](./ucode/llms.txt): Mock summary for ucode fs (UPDATED). This handles atomic writes. (~55 tokens)
- [luci](./luci/llms.txt): Mock summary for LuCI XHR. It provides AJAX capabilities. (~52 tokens)

## Manuals
- [wiki](./wiki/llms.txt): No description (~5023 tokens)

## Complete Aggregation
If your context window permits, you may fetch the flat URL index:
- [llms-full.txt](./llms-full.txt)
